All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

S

Scoreboard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game
The Scoreboard class contains a table of players with their corresponding points and methods to interact with it.
Scoreboard(List<Player>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.Scoreboard
The Scoreboard(participants) constructor creates a new Hashtable and adds all the participants (taken from the list given as a parameter) to the table while assigning them 0 points.
send(Message) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.ClientHandler
This method is used to send a message to the client.
SEND_RESULTS - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.messages.MessageId
SEND RESULTS message type
sendInitial(List<StandardCard>, List<StandardCard>, StartCard, List<StandardCard>, ObjectiveCard[], ObjectiveCard[], Resource, Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the sendInitial method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
sendInitial(List<StandardCard>, List<StandardCard>, StartCard, List<StandardCard>, ObjectiveCard[], ObjectiveCard[], Resource, Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the sendInitial method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
sendInitial(List<StandardCard>, List<StandardCard>, StartCard, List<StandardCard>, ObjectiveCard[], ObjectiveCard[], Resource, Resource) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the sendInitial method is called to set up the start of the game.
sendNowUnavailableToken(String, Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the nowUnavailableToken method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
sendNowUnavailableToken(String, Token) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the nowUnavailableToken method set to the player the token he chose, removing it from the list of the available ones to choose from.
sendPlayersInOrder(List<Player>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the sendPLayersInOrder method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
sendPlayersInOrder(List<Player>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the sendPlayersInOrder method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
sendPlayersInOrder(List<Player>) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the sendPlayersInOrder method is called to see the ordered list of the players according to their turn.
sendPlayersInOrder(List<String>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the sendPlayersInOrder method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
sendPlayersInOrder(List<String>) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the sendPlayersInOrder method sends a randomly generated list of the players, ordered according to their turns in the game.
sendResults(PlayerPoints[]) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.RMIVirtualView
the sendResults method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with an RMI connection.
sendResults(PlayerPoints[]) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.TCPVirtualView
the sendResults method implements the usage of the method in the VirtualView Interface, for the players with a TCP connection.
sendResults(PlayerPoints[]) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.virtualview.VirtualView
the sendResults method calculates and shows the final points of each player.
ServerMain - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server
This class is used to launch the server.
ServerMain() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.ServerMain
 
ServerTCP - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server
This class is used to launch the server.
ServerTCP(int, MultipleMatchesHandler) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.ServerTCP
This constructor is used to create a new server.
setAvailableCards() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
The method setAvailableCards sets up the list of available and cards that the player is able to see and can draw when in his turn.
setAvailableGoldCards(List<StandardCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the list of all the available gold cards.
setAvailableResourceCards(List<StandardCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the list of all the available resource cards.
setCurrentStatus(GameStatus) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
the setCurrentStatus method sets the current status of the game.
setDisconnectionText(String) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.LoginController
This method is called when the user is redirected here after another player in his lobby has disconnected
setEndGameStarted(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method setEndGameStarted set the attribute endGameStarted to true if the game has entered the final phase.
setFinalPoints(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Setter of the final points.
setGame(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The setGame(game) method checks if the player already has a linked game and if it hasn't, it links the player to the game he is currently playing, which is given as a parameter.
setGameInstance(GameModel) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the setGameInstance method sets the model as the instance of the game created.
setGameStarted(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method setGameStarted set the attribute isGameStarted to true if the game is started and instanced.
setGUI(GUIView) - Static method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIViewApplication
This method is used to set the GUI reference.
setGuiReference(GUIView) - Static method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.GUIController
Sets the guiReference attribute to the given GUIView object.
setHand(List<StandardCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The setHand(hand) method checks if the hand of the player has been initialized and if it hasn't it assigns the hand attribute to the list of cards given as parameters.
setHasBlackToken(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Setter of the hasBlackToken boolean.
setKingdom(Kingdom) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Setter of the kingdom.
setLinkedSide(Side) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Corner
The setLinkedSide(linkedSide) method assigns the linkedSide attribute to the Side object given as parameter.
setListener(PropertyChangeListener) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the listener of the model.
setListOfLobbies(List<Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the list of all the lobbies.
setMe(ClientSidePlayer) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the player that is currently playing.
setMyHand(List<StandardCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the hand of the player.
setMyPrivateObjective(ObjectiveCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the private objective card that the player has chosen.
setMyStartCard(StartCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the start card that the player has chosen.
setNumOfLobby(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the number of the lobby the player is in.
setNumOfPlayers(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the number of players in the lobby.
setObjectivesCompleted(int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Setter of the objectivesCompleted.
setObjectivesToChooseFrom(ObjectiveCard[]) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
the method setObjectivesToChooseFrom sets the objectives from which the player will have to choose one.
setOut(ObjectOutputStream) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.virtualserver.TCPVirtualServer
setter for the ObjectOutputStream.
setPlayersInOrder(List<String>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the list of players in order of turn.
setPrivateObjective(ObjectiveCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The setPrivateObjective(c) method sets the Player's private ObjectiveCard to the one given as a parameter.
setPrivateObjectives(List<ObjectiveCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the list of all the private objectives in the game.
setPublicObjectives() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
The method setPublicObjectives sets up the objectives the players have in common.
setPublicObjectives(List<ObjectiveCard>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the list of all the public objectives in the game.
setStartCard(StartCard) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The setStartCard(startCard) method checks if the startCard has already been assigned to the player and if it hasn't it assigns the startCard attribute to the card given as a parameter.
setState(State) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the setState attribute sets the actual state of the game passed by parameter.
setState(ViewState) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
Setter for the state.
setToken(Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.player.Player
The setToken(token)method checks if the player already has a linked token and if it hasn't, it links the player to the token he has chosen, which is given as a parameter.
setToken(Token) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSidePlayer
Setter of the token.
setTopOfGoldDeck(Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the resource card that is on top of the gold deck.
setTopOfResourceDeck(Resource) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.clientmodel.ClientSideGameModel
Sets the resource card that is on top of the resource deck.
setupEndGame() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
the setupEndGame method calculate which is going to be the number of the last turn.
setupPlayPhase() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.game.GameModel
the setupPlayPhase sets the turn counter and proceed to randomly create the order of the player's turns, setting then the current turn.
setUsedDiagonal(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Side
The setUsedDiagonal(usedDiagonal) method sets the usedDiagonal attribute to the value given as a parameter.
setUsedLCorner(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Side
The setUsedLCorner(usedLCorner) method sets the usedLCorner attribute to the value given as a parameter.
setUsedLLeg(boolean) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Side
The setUsedLLeg(usedLLeg) method sets the usedLLeg attribute to the value given as a parameter.
setVirtualServer(VirtualServer) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
Setter for the virtual server.
setVirtualView(Player, VirtualView) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.GameController
the method setVirtualView sets the Virtual View of the player passed by parameter.
setWinner(List<ClientSidePlayer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ShowResultsController
Method that sets the winner of the game
SHOW_RESULTS - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.ViewState
The view is in the state of showing the results of the game.
showResults(Map<String, Integer>, Map<String, Integer>) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the sendResults method implements the usage of method from the RMIClientSkeleton Interface.
showResults(Map<String, Integer>, Map<String, Integer>) - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.RMIClientSkeleton
the sendResults method sends the final points of each player.
ShowResultsController - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers
This class is the controller for the ShowResults.fxml file
ShowResultsController() - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.controllers.ShowResultsController
 
shuffle() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.Deck
The shuffle() method will randomize the position of the cards in the list so that we can always pick the first one of the pile when calling the method drawCard().
Side - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides
The Side abstract class represent the idea of a generic side of a card.
Side(Corner, Corner, Corner, Corner, Resource) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.sides.Side
The Side(tl, tr, bl, br) constructor assigns the corner to the ones given as parameters.
StandardCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable
The StandardCard abstract class represents a generic gold card from the game, has two sides and has a main Resource, which can also be interpreted as his colour.
StandardCard(int, Front, Back) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.StandardCard
The StandardCard(id, front, back, mainResource) constructor uses the constructor of the superclass to assign the id, front and back sides of the card and then assigns the mainResource to the one given as a parameter.
start(Stage) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.GUI.GUIViewApplication
This method is used to start the GUI of the game.
StartCard - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable
The StartCard class represents a generic start card of the game.
StartCard(int, Front, Back, List<Resource>) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.cards.placeable.StartCard
The StartCard(id, front, back) constructor uses the constructor of the superclasses to assign the id, the front and the back.
startClient() - Method in interface it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientConnectionInterface
the startClient method is called by the ClientMain to connect the Client and the view.
startClient() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientRMI
the startClient method implements the usage of the method from the ClientConnectionInterface.
startClient() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.client.ClientTCP
the startClient method implements the usage of the method from the ClientConnectionInterface.
StartDeck - Class in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks
The StartDeck class is a subclass of Deck that creates a list of StartCards.
StartDeck(CardCreator) - Constructor for class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.model.decks.StartDeck
The StartDeck(cc) constructor calls the constructor of the superclass to instantiate the ArrayList of cards, then it assigns the fileName attribute to the StartCards.json file in the /resources/cards/ folder and finally, it calls the initializeDeck(cc) method to create the list of ResourceCards.
startPingingClient() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.RMIServer
This method is used to start the pinging thread that checks if the clients are still connected to the server.
startServer() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.network.server.ServerTCP
This method is used to start the server.
state - Variable in class it.polimi.ingsw.am37.view.View
The state of the view.
State - Interface in it.polimi.ingsw.am37.controller.states
the State interface represents each state of the game.
